iti43:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti43:2.2:
If there were not that unborn–unbecome–unmade–unfabricated,
there would not be the case that escape from the born–become–made–fabricated would be discerned.
iti43:2.3:
But precisely because there is an unborn–unbecome–unmade–unfabricated,
escape from the born–become–made–fabricated is thus discerned.”
iti43:4.1: come-into-being through nourishment and the guide [that is craving]–
iti43:4.3: The escape from that is peaceful, permanent,
